title: [16x] Simple Bedwars pack by Nemyx
description: A lightweight resource pack for bedwars, including block breaking progress bar, small swords, and more!
body:
## Nemyx's Simple Bedwars pack

A lightweight resource pack for bedwars, including block breaking progress bar, small swords, and more, without too modifying vanilla textures!

Here is an image:

![Preview Ilage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7I5Ou7D2/images/ef6c7c088552659a75d796561878dc35263e73a2.png)

_This pack is in beta, many things may change!_

This pack is inspired by Lumin 16x
